documents.text: SwiftLM performs Metal inference on Apple Silicon.
SwiftLM treats safetensors as canonical and uses STAF as a regenerable execution cache.
Qwen3-VL bundles can prepare image and video prompts with a vision encoder.
EmbeddingGemma returns normalized 768-dimensional sentence embeddings for retrieval.
Tokyo is the capital city of Japan.
A ripe banana is yellow and curved.
Sentence-transformers often use mean pooling followed by L2 normalization for embeddings.
Metal 4 requires explicit residency for page-aligned buffers on Apple Silicon.
